title: Proceedings Digital Edition Archive
text:
Experience Proceedings magazine online the way it was meant to be – flip through the pages of our stunning publication as an interactive PDF!
The digital edition allows you to:
- Flip through each issue page by page, or scroll through our Contents page to find the features you're most interested in.
- Utilize keyword search functionality to hone in on specific topics.
- Toggle to full screen mode.
- Zoom in and out on content as needed.
Digital editions are currently available for the November 2024 issue of Proceedings magazine onward.
This feature is exclusively for our members. You must be logged into an account associated with an active membership in order to access.
